standards.normal_icon_atlas: 4x4 grid, sizes 256/128/80/64/45/32, DXT5/BC3 with alpha, no mipmaps; one combined atlas so the leader icon shares DXT5; subject contained at the per-category scale (0.58 unit/building, 0.68 promotion, 0.75 leader)
standards.alpha_team_icons: FLORENCE_ALPHA_ATLAS-style 1x1 atlas rows, white-on-transparent uncompressed A8R8G8B8 at 128/80/64/48/45/32/24
standards.unit_flags: 8x8 256x256 atlas with 32px cells, uncompressed A8R8G8B8, silhouette at 0.78
standards.large_images: Dawn of Man DXT1 (no mipmaps), Leader 2D scene DXT1 (with mip chain); map 512x512 uncompressed A8R8G8B8
